content:
I have [Twitter](http://twitter.com/macsf).

I also have [Tumblr](http://archive.macsf.tumblr.com/).

And I also have [Vox](http://archive.macsf.vox.com/).

And [Flickr](http://flickr.com/photos/macsfbox/).

Not to mention [many](http://archive.macsf.jaiku.com/) [other](http://www.facebook.com/) [services](http://archive.macsfhf.hi5.com).

There are many more I'm missing. :P
